title: Hills
summary: 200px|rightHills was a department store which was in operation from 1957 to 1999. During the last few years of its existence, Hills commissioned several Hot Wheels sets and vehicles to be sold exclusively at its stores. From 1995 to 1997 Hot Wheels produced exclusive 'Year in Review' box sets for Hills which featured all twelve First Editions from the year.
